steps.title: Find the shared complaint
steps.content: Text 1 says scholarship overemphasizes fragmented structures and neglects coherent ones. Text 2 says scholarship has focused too much on fragmentation versus coherence and has missed other shared stylistic features.

steps.title: Name the incomplete view
steps.content: Choice B adds obsolete methods, which neither text claims. Choice C focuses on rehabilitating reputations, which Text 2 does not. Choice D says scholarship should move beyond style, but both texts discuss style. Both authors would agree current scholarship only partly captures modernist fiction's stylistic range. The answer is A.
